audit_items.proof_trace: Cache is updated for all imported data columns via apply_data_column_sidecar (L2606-2616) which inserts into accepted_data_column_sidecars map. The block_seen bypass (L2096-2103) is intentional for custody backfill and does not prevent cache updates. Guard at mutator.rs:L1536 only skips re-processing of already-cached columns.
